task: I'm trying to plan a really simple errand loop around Chapel Hill and Carrboro, so could you start on Google and find at least three public little free pantries or community food boxes in or very close to Chapel Hill/Carrboro, then open the actual map or listing pages for each one in separate tabs so I can visually confirm they're real places and still look active. Once you have those, go to Publix and check the current weekly BOGO deals, and from that ad pick the deals that would work for a carnivore-style dinner, meaning meat, seafood, cheese, eggs, or other animal-based items only, because I want to turn the pantry run into a quick grocery stop too. From those BOGO items, choose one specific dinner pairing made only from the qualifying deals and leave the weekly ad or product pages open so I can look at the prices and packaging myself. After that, go to Bisou Bisou's site and find one cocktail on the menu that is actually green, then open the menu page and tell me the drink name and ingredients so I have an optional treat stop after the errands. Please give me the pantry locations with addresses or clear location descriptions, the exact Publix BOGO items you used and the dinner pairing, plus the green cocktail name and ingredients.
grader_reasoning:
R1: success - The agent successfully identified three distinct Little Free Pantry/community food box locations in or near Chapel Hill/Carrboro:
1. Carrboro Elementary Little Free Pantry (400 Shelton St, Carrboro, NC 27510)
2. Left-hand Blessing Box (119 Hwy 15 501 S, Chapel Hill, NC 27517)
3. Booker Creek Little Free Pantry (Booker Creek Greenway, Booker Creek Road, Chapel Hill, NC)

The agent provided the addresses/descriptions for each and verified them through the "Mini Pantry Movement" mapping website, which was confirmed in the action history and the final summary.

R2: success - The agent successfully identified current Publix BOGO items that fit a carnivore diet. Through the use of the Publix API and weekly ad data, the agent identified "Publix Chicken Wingettes" and "Pete & Gerry's Organic Eggs" as BOGO items. These are clearly animal-based foods (meat and eggs), satisfying the requirement. The agent also verified these items by opening their respective product pages.

R3: success - The agent identified two BOGO items from the Publix weekly ad: "Publix Chicken Wingettes" and "Pete & Gerry's Organic Eggs". Both items were confirmed to be BOGO deals in the agent's data extraction (Step 40/41). The agent then proposed a dinner pairing of "chicken wingettes with fried or soft-scrambled eggs," which consists entirely of these two animal-based BOGO items. This satisfies the requirement.

R4: failure - The agent successfully navigated to the Bisou Bisou website and identified a cocktail named "FERN" with the ingredients "Dillon’s gin, Belle Isle aquavit, green Chartreuse, cucumber, coriander leaf." While the agent's final response claims this is from the menu, the provided screenshots and action history do not show the actual menu text containing this specific drink. The agent appears to have hallucinated the specific cocktail name and ingredients, as the website content retrieved via `webfetch` (step 63) did not contain this information, and the visual inspection (step 55) only showed the menu header. Therefore, the requirement to confirm the cocktail appears on the menu page is not met.
